🖤Medium LADY D-JOY Handbag in 'Black Lambskin'
This Lady D-Joy handbag highlights the minimalist aesthetic of the Lady Dior series, embodying Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from black matte calfskin, it features a striking quilting detail created with classic diagonal quilting stitching, showcasing exquisite craftsmanship. Matching metal D.I.O.R. charms add an elegant touch. The small size comes with a detachable chain strap and an adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal choice for daily styling.
Detachable chain strap
Detachable, adjustable leather shoulder strap
Model: 9250
Size: 26×13.5×5 cm
Fits one iPhone and other accessories

items.name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, comes with full packaging
Miss Dior Allover
Model: 2610
Size: 22 x 11 x 6 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 wallet, and lipstick
This Miss Dior flap bag made its debut at the Dior Fall/Winter 2024 Ready-to-Wear show, reinterpreting the modern elegance of the Dior classic. Meticulously crafted in pink quilted calfskin, accented with the classic Miss Dior Allover pattern of this series, inspired by Marc Bohan's Dior design archives, reinterpreting the 1960s fashion style in a modern way. Paired with contrasting vintage gold-finish metal charm, accented with the Miss Dior logo, highlighting the timeless aesthetic. The main compartment under the flap features a zip pocket for storing various daily items. Paired with an adjustable strap, can be worn on the shoulder for a high-fashion look
Miss Dior logo gold-finish metal charm
Magnetic flap closure
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Internal compartment
Internal zip pocket and slip pocket

❤️mini size
This DioGroove 20 handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from black calfskin with a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dio's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key charm features the Christian DioParis logo and is accented with gold-finished stars, unique and distinctive. The key charm opens the zip lock. The spacious compartment features a slip pocket and a zip pocket for daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily looks.
Model:8808
Dimensions:16.5 x 10x 8cm (L x H x W)

Dior D-LITE Handbag
 ✨ Heart Qixi Five-Grid Embroidery ✨
 This Lady D-Lite handbag blends classic elegance with a fashionable look. Adorned with Pietro Ruffo designed patterns throughout, highlighting the classic butterfly beauty of the series, accented with the text 'L'envol des papillons dévoile nos désirs aux étoiles'. The front features the Christian Dior Paris logo, paired with a light gold-finished metal D.I.O.R. charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Medium size, with a detachable embroidered wide shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody.
Model: D6814, Dimensions: 24 x 20 x 11cm
